articles.title: Wildfire smoke from Canada, Minnesota pushes farther into the US
articles.description:
Saturday brings a high chance of thunderstorms across much of the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic, which will help dampen the bad air.

The post Wildfire smoke from Canada, Minnesota pushes farther into the US appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Wildfire smoke from Canada and Minnesota reaches Boston, affecting air quality.
Thunderstorms expected Saturday will help improve air conditions across the Northeast.
Residents advised to stay indoors during high smoke levels for health safety.
